scripts.test: bun --cwd packages/core run test && bun --cwd packages/code-agent run test && bun --cwd packages/eval run test
scripts.test:coverage: bun --cwd packages/core run test:coverage && bun --cwd packages/code-agent run test && bun --cwd packages/eval run test:coverage
scripts.test:ci: bun --cwd packages/core run test:ci && bun --cwd packages/code-agent run test && bun --cwd packages/eval run test:ci
